summary: Current working-tree source-guard evidence passed the substantive PH1.5 checklist: master hash recorded, child results schema-valid, source hashes reverified, batch-001 counts and project IDs match, real approvals remain zero, fail-closed synthetic coverage is recorded, and allowed evidence says no real generator, baseline, or sanitized bundle was produced. Overall status is INCONCLUSIVE because commit 0a944ec could not be independently inspected without git access and because of the noted audit read-scope caveat.
blockers: Commit 0a944ec was not independently audited: no git executable was available, and .git was outside the declared allowed read paths.
One initial text search was broader than the task's PH1_5-only orchestration/results allowance; non-PH1.5 hits were not used as evidence.
Direct filesystem absence checks for real baselines or generated outputs were constrained by forbidden evals/runs and target-drawing boundaries; the audit relies on allowed recorded evidence.
